name: enkente-chat-bridge
description: Intercepts VS Code chat messages and forwards them to the enkente ingestion API

enkente.apiUrl.description: The URL of the enkente ingestion API

enkente.enabled.description: Enable or disable the chat bridge

enkente.postMessageCommand.description: Optional command to run after each message (e.g., a script that forwards the message)

enumDescriptions: Automatically detect the best available identity (GitHub → Microsoft → env → anonymous)
Use the logged-in GitHub account name
Use the logged-in Microsoft account name
Use the GPG key fingerprint as a stable cryptographic user token
Use the OS username from environment variables
Generate a deterministic anonymized hash from the resolved identity
enkente.identityProvider.description: Which identity provider to use for attributing chat messages
